crosswalk_evidence: Metabolomics Workbench factors expose matching local_sample_id roots: plasma DS027 uses numeric IDs such as 10177, 10180, 10191; stool DS057 uses STL-prefixed matching IDs such as STL10177, STL10180, STL10191. Matching IDs have the same collectionWeek and PUCAI_C3_WKall factors but different biospecimens and MW sample IDs.
subject_sample_overlap_result: Confirmed subject overlap: all 89 DS027 plasma samples/subject IDs are present in DS057 stool after stripping the STL prefix. DS057 has 91 stool samples/subject IDs total, with two stool-only IDs: 10323 and 10860. These should not be counted as independent cohorts.
